allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); where.exe node; node --version; where.exe npm; npm --version)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://player.tarkov.dev/name/namsr_TTV" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode; $_.Exception.Response.Headers | ForEach-Object { $_ }; $_.ErrorDetails.Message })

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://player.tarkov.dev/name/namsr_TTV" -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; $r.Content } catch { "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)"; "Headers:"; foreach\($h in $_.Exception.Response.Headers.GetEnumerator\(\)\) { "$\($h.Key\): $\($h.Value\)" }; "Body: $\($_.ErrorDetails.Message\)" })

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\": \\"{ __schema { queryType { fields { name description } } } }\\"}")
